issues: Panel B header 'BIOLOGY-INFORMED RECURSIVE ROUTING & CLASSIFICATION' is too long: it overflows across the very top edge, wraps awkwardly ('...RECURSIVE' sits above the panel and 'ROUTING & CLASSIFICATION' below), and reads as cut off / outside the blue panel border.
Panel A label 'MARKER SELECTION' collides with the hero graph's title 'Learned gene-gene graph' at top-left — the two text strings overlap and are hard to separate.
The 'Ĝ (low-rank, end-to-end)' caption overlaps the graph node-link cluster, muddying the hero element that is supposed to be the #1 focal point.
Efficiency badges '4× fewer params' and '~38% fewer FLOPs' overlap the bar-chart plotting area (top-right corner of the chart); '4×' sits on top of the LEARNED bar region, hurting legibility of both.
Bar-chart x-axis labels (none / random / fixed / LEARNED) are cramped and tiny; 'LEARNED' runs into the chart border and the group is barely readable at figure scale.

The ×K weight-shared recursive loop — emphasis-hierarchy item #3 — is faint and small. The 'weight-shared ×K' loop arrow over the shared block is not visually bold; it does not read as a clear recursion signal.

Entire Panel-B top band (shared block → MoR router → pool → head → output) is rendered in very light grey and looks washed-out/disabled rather than the specified solid blue; 'primed by graph', 'ONE block', and the MoR depth bars are nearly invisible.
The '+11.7' delta annotation floats between the bars and the badges with no clear bracket/arrow spanning random(57.5)→LEARNED(70.8); the gain is stated but not visually anchored to the two bars.

Arrow a8 ('+ β_t·π_m', graph primes depth router) and the a2 dashed 'smooth x (denoise)' hero arrow are present but the labels sit on top of other text; overall left-panel text density causes multiple minor overlaps.
revision_instructions: 1) Shorten/relayout Panel B title to two safe lines INSIDE the panel, e.g. 'RECURSIVE ROUTING' / '& CLASSIFICATION', top-left, small-caps blue, with margin from the top border so nothing clips. 2) Move Panel A 'MARKER SELECTION' label to the extreme top-left corner and push the hero graph + its 'Learned gene-gene graph' title down/right so the two never overlap; place 'Ĝ (low-rank, end-to-end)' BELOW the graph cluster, not across it. 3) Darken/solidify the entire Panel-B top band to real blue (shared block, MoR router, pool, head, output) — it currently looks disabled; make text (ONE block, primed by graph, MoR depth bars) fully opaque. 4) Make the ×K weight-shared loop arrow BOLD blue with a clear curved loop over the shared block and a prominent 'weight-shared ×K' label — this is emphasis #3 and must read instantly. 5) Move both efficiency badges fully to the RIGHT of the bar chart (clear of the plotting area) and stack them vertically; ensure zero overlap with bars or badge labels. 6) Enlarge and de-crowd the bar-chart x labels (none / random / fixed / LEARNED); give the chart more horizontal room and keep LEARNED off the border. 7) Add an explicit green bracket/arrow spanning from the random bar (57.5) up to the LEARNED bar (70.8) carrying '+11.7', so the delta is visually anchored to the two bars. 8) Increase left-panel spacing generally to remove residual text-on-text overlaps around a2 ('smooth x (denoise)') and a8 ('+ β_t·π_m').
